message:
feat(e2e): add concurrency scaling, MVCC mode, repeat runs, and DB corruption fixtures

Extend realdb_e2e CLI with --concurrency accepting comma-separated lists
for scaling sweeps, --repeat for statistical confidence, and --mvcc flag
for FrankenSQLite concurrent_mode. Add RunAgg collector with p50/p95
percentile stats and scaling summary table. Add setup_db_fixture() for
rollback-journal DB creation and inject_db_corruption() for direct DB-file
corruption scenarios. Support CorruptionTarget::Database path with WAL
checkpoint before injection. Add parse_u16_list parser with unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
